title: Prevent a potential race when stopping containers
body:
If sending a signal fails, check if the container is alive. If it is not, it probably stopped on its own before we could send the signal, so don't error out.

Inspired by CRI-O https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1478

@TomSweeneyRedHat Logs is another common flake because of race conditions, I think - the test spins up a container and immediately does a 'logs' on it...
